expectations.text: Loads the plan file and identifies current phase status before making changes
expectations.evidence: Step 1 reads the plan and builds a detailed 20-phase status table with checkpoint status and session notes. Identifies Phase 20 as the resume point.

expectations.text: Reads ALL files listed in Phase 1 before modifying anything
expectations.evidence: Step 2 lists all files that would need reading for Phase 20 (the current phase), organized by category. Notes 'In a real implementation, each would be read before modification.'

expectations.text: Marks each step checkbox as completed: - [x]
expectations.evidence: Each of the 9 steps includes 'Mark checkbox: - [x]' at the end (simulated).

expectations.text: Runs verification commands specified in the plan
expectations.evidence: Step 4 lists verification commands including 'vsce package' and 'npm run make', correctly noting the first verification was already checked.

expectations.text: Marks the phase checkpoint as complete
expectations.evidence: Step 5: 'Would mark in the plan file: Checkpoint: [x] Phase 20 complete' and 'update the plan frontmatter: status: complete'.

expectations.text: Presents a Phase 1 Complete summary with changes, verification status, and next phase
expectations.evidence: Step 6 presents 'Phase 20 Complete (SIMULATED)' with Changes list, Verification status, and notes this is the final phase.

expectations.text: Stops and waits for user approval before proceeding to Phase 2
expectations.evidence: Step 6 is explicitly 'STOP and Confirm' per the workflow. The skill correctly stops at the checkpoint.
